# Requirements Quality Checklist: Admin Certificate Type and Template Management

**Purpose**: Validate whether requirements are complete, clear, consistent, measurable, and ready for implementation planning and PR review.
**Created**: 2026-04-14
**Feature**: [Link to spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are admin authorization requirements defined for every management action (list, create, update, archive, delete, upload, replace)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-013]
- [ ] CHK002 Are required data attributes for creating a certificate type explicitly specified, including constraints for name, slug, description, and legacy mapping? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, Spec §Key Entities]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements defined for selecting and maintaining exactly one active template per certificate type? [Gap, Spec §User Story 2]
- [ ] CHK004 Are restore/reactivation requirements for archived types/templates explicitly defined, or explicitly out of scope? [Gap, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK005 Are requirements specified for compatibility status refresh cadence and trigger points (page load, manual retry, action-time checks)? [Gap, Spec §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK006 Are requirements for auditability/history of admin actions (who changed what and when) defined or intentionally excluded? [Gap, Spec §Key Entities]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK007 Is "active references" quantified with precise reference sources and counting rules? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK008 Is "latest successful write" operationally defined for near-simultaneous updates across multiple app instances? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-016]
- [ ] CHK009 Is "manual publication guidance via deploy/FTP" defined with minimum required instruction content and completion criteria? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012]
- [ ] CHK010 Are case-insensitive duplicate-name rules clarified for accents, whitespace normalization, and special characters? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK011 Are path constraints for `/public/pdf-templates/{typeId}/{uuid}.pdf` clear about `{typeId}` format and UUID version expectations? [Clarity, Spec §FR-017]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK012 Do lifecycle terms (`inactive`, `archived`, `deleted`) stay consistent across stories, functional requirements, entities, and assumptions? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §FR-005, Spec §Key Entities]
- [ ] CHK013 Are deletion outcomes consistent between user stories and FR rules for both certificate type and template entities? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK014 Are storage-mode requirements consistent between writable and non-writable environments without contradictory paths or actions? [Consistency, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-017]
- [ ] CHK015 Do upload constraints in edge cases, FRs, and assumptions all align on PDF-only and 10 MB limits? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-015, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK016 Are concurrency expectations consistent between edge cases, FR-016, and success criteria? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-016, Spec §SC-007]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK017 Can SC-001 be objectively measured from defined telemetry/events and completion boundaries? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK018 Is SC-003 measurable with a clear denominator definition for "valid template upload attempts"? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003]
- [ ] CHK019 Does SC-004 define objective evidence for "guidance shown before workflow ends"? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK020 Are acceptance scenarios mapped to every critical requirement, including FR-011 through FR-017? [Gap, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §FR-011, Spec §FR-017]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK021 Are alternate-flow requirements specified for environments that switch from writable to non-writable during runtime? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §User Story 3]
- [ ] CHK022 Are exception-flow requirements defined for partial failures (metadata saved but file write fails, or file persisted but metadata fails)? [Coverage, Exception Flow, Gap]
- [ ] CHK023 Are recovery requirements defined after failed upload validation to preserve admin input and retry context? [Coverage, Recovery, Gap, Spec §FR-014]
- [ ] CHK024 Are operational scenarios covered for list filtering, pagination, and repeated admin updates in one session? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §FR-001]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK025 Are requirements defined for repeated uploads of identical PDF content (deduplicate vs accept as new version)? [Edge Case, Gap]
- [ ] CHK026 Are requirements defined for orphaned files or orphaned metadata reconciliation after interrupted operations? [Edge Case, Recovery, Gap]
- [ ] CHK027 Is fallback behavior specified when manual deploy/FTP publication finishes but metadata linking is delayed? [Edge Case, Gap, Spec §FR-012]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK028 Are admin UX latency targets tied to specific operations (list, create, update, delete, upload, compatibility check)? [Clarity, Spec §NFR-003, Spec §NFR-004]
- [ ] CHK029 Are accessibility requirements measurable for keyboard navigation, focus visibility/order, and error announcements in admin flows? [Gap, Spec §NFR-002]
- [ ] CHK030 Are security requirements explicit for upload abuse controls (content validation, filename sanitization, and server-side size enforcement)? [Gap, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK031 Are observability requirements specified (logs, metrics, and evidence sources) to validate SC-001 through SC-007 after release? [Gap, Spec §NFR-005, Spec §Success Criteria]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK032 Are assumptions about existing admin authentication and template consumption validated by explicit dependency contracts? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK033 Is dependence on cPanel permission behavior documented with acceptance boundaries for host variability? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions, Spec §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK034 Are identifier and naming expectations aligned across requirement text (`typeId`, UUID path, status states) without schema-level conflicts? [Conflict, Spec §FR-017, Spec §Key Entities]
- [ ] CHK035 Is an explicit requirement-to-evidence mapping scheme defined for PR traceability and audit reviews? [Traceability, Gap, Spec §NFR-005]
